title: Tilray Brands Reports Q1 2024 Financial Results
text: Tilray reported record Q1 net revenue of $177 million, representing 15% growth year over year. Cannabis net revenue rose 20%, or 22% on a constant-currency basis. Distribution revenue rose 14%, or 11% on a constant-currency basis. Beverage alcohol revenue rose 17%, and wellness revenue declined 1% but was flat on a constant-currency basis. Tilray increased its #1 cannabis market share position in Canada to 13.4% and grew Canadian cannabis revenue by 16.5% and international cannabis revenue by 37%. International cannabis grew 37% largely because of expansion into emerging international medical markets. Tilray closed on three transactions during FY 2024: HEXO Corp. in June, Truss Beverage Co. in August, and the acquisition of eight beer and beverage brands from Anheuser-Busch. The company reiterated its adjusted EBITDA target of $68 million to $78 million for fiscal year 2024 and expected to generate positive adjusted free cash flow.
